name: Generique
description: Profil par defaut — toutes les analyses disponibles. Podcasts, interviews, notes vocales, conferences.

analyses.label: Resume
analyses.prompt: Produce a structured summary of this transcript with: title, introduction, main points, and conclusion. Be comprehensive and capture all important information. Return valid JSON: {"title": "...", "introduction": "...", "points": ["..."], "conclusion": "..."}
analyses.prompt_v2: Tu es un assistant expert en synthese. 1) Detecte automatiquement le TYPE de contenu (interview, conference, podcast, reunion informelle, monologue, debat, tutoriel). 2) Adapte le format au type detecte. 3) Ajoute 'Ton general' (informatif, pedagogique, debat, emotionnel, humoristique). 4) Ajoute 'Public cible' detecte. Return valid JSON: {"title": "...", "content_type": "interview/conference/podcast/reunion/monologue/debat/tutoriel", "tone": "informatif/pedagogique/debat/emotionnel/humoristique", "target_audience": "...", "introduction": "...", "points": ["..."], "conclusion": "..."}

analyses.label: Points cles
analyses.prompt: Extract the key points from this transcript as thematic bullet points. Group related points together under clear themes. Return valid JSON: {"keypoints": [{"theme": "...", "points": ["..."]}]}
analyses.prompt_v2: Tu es un analyste expert. Extrais les points cles HIERARCHISES par importance (pas juste listes). Ajoute des 'citations verbatim' les plus marquantes du transcript. Regroupe par theme avec transitions logiques. Return valid JSON: {"keypoints": [{"theme": "...", "importance": "critical/high/medium", "points": ["..."], "verbatim_quote": "..."}]}

analyses.label: Actions
analyses.prompt: Extract action items, decisions taken, and open questions from this transcript. Be exhaustive. Return valid JSON: {"actions": ["..."], "decisions": ["..."], "questions": ["..."]}

analyses.label: Fiches
analyses.prompt: Create revision flashcards (question/answer pairs) from this transcript. Cover all important facts and concepts. Create at least 8 cards. Return valid JSON: {"cards": [{"question": "...", "answer": "..."}]}

analyses.label: Quiz
analyses.prompt: Create a multiple-choice quiz (5-6 questions) from this transcript. Each choice must be a full text answer. Include a mix of easy and hard questions. Return valid JSON: {"questions": [{"question": "What is...?", "choices": ["Answer A", "Answer B", "Answer C", "Answer D"], "answer": "A", "explanation": "Because..."}]}

analyses.label: Carte mentale
analyses.prompt: Create a hierarchical mindmap of this transcript in Markmap-compatible markdown. Be comprehensive and show relationships between topics. Return valid JSON: {"markdown": "# Topic\n## Subtopic\n- Point"}

analyses.label: Slides
analyses.prompt: Create a slide presentation from this transcript. 6-10 slides with clear titles and concise bullet points. Return valid JSON: {"slides": [{"title": "...", "bullets": ["..."]}]}

analyses.label: Infographie
analyses.prompt: Extract data points for a Vega-Lite chart from this transcript. Identify quantitative data, comparisons, trends, or categories that can be visualized. Return valid JSON: {"description": "...", "spec": {}}

analyses.label: Tableaux
analyses.prompt: Extract structured data tables from this transcript. Identify any information that can be organized in tabular format. Return valid JSON: {"tables": [{"title": "...", "headers": ["..."], "rows": [["..."]]}]}
